proposal.hypothesis: Dense normalized quality penalties will keep the residual near the upright prior while teaching it to cancel high-frequency torque, planted slip, and hard touchdown.
proposal.expectedEffect: Reduce the current residual Policy's ten violations toward the seven-violation program tier without regressing upright or transition gates.

gateReasons: delayed-forward: planar-velocity-tracking regressed from passing to failing
upright-locomotion: delayed-forward: yaw-rate-tracking regressed from passing to failing
command-transitions: forward-reverse-stop: unsettled-planar regressed from passing to failing
command-transitions: delayed-braking: planar-overshoot regressed from passing to failing
